titleStmt.title: SII 22.274: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 274. (A.R. No. 274 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA I—38th YEAR (A.D. 1107-08)

summary.p: This has the introduction Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc. after a few expressions of Vīramē tuṇai introduction of Vīrarājēndra. It records a gift of 30 cows for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple at Tirumālpēṟu in Valla-nāḍu a division of Dāmaṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by Araiyaṉ Vīraśōḻaṉ alias Vīramārttāṇḍa-Viḻupparaiyaṉ of Eḻumuḷḷūr in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu, a division of Rājanārāyaṇa-vaḷanāḍu in Śōḻamaṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . virame tuṇai Ākavum tiyākame Aṇiākavum ceṅ koloccik karuṅkali kaṭintu
pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta
maṇimuṭi cūṭi villavar kulaitara minavar nilaikeṭa Eṉai mannava ririyaluṟṟiḻi tarat tikkaṉaittu n=taṉ cakka
ra naṭātti vijayaābhiṣekam paṇṇi virasiṅhāsanattu Avanimuḻuvatum Uṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājake
saripanmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḷadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 8āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu
tāmaṟkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭut tirumālppeṟṟu Uṭaiyār tirumālp peṟuṭaiyāṟkkuc coḻamaṇṭala
ttu rājanārāyaṇavaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaḻunntūrnāṭṭu Eḻumuḷḷūruṭaiyān Araiyan viracoḻaṉāṉa viramāttāṇṭa viḻup
paraiyan tirumālppeṟuṭaiyārkku cantrādityavaṟ cellakkaṭavatāka vaitta tiru nantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa cāvāmuvāppacu
30 Ippacu muppatum Ikkoyilil tirunan=tāviḷakkiṭaiyan mātevaṭikaḷ tirumālppeṟuṭaiyānum Iva
n tampi māṟilāmaṇiyum kaikkoṇṭu māṟilāmaṇi nāḻiyāl nittamuḻakku ney viṭṭu Ittiru nan=tāviḷakkonṟu
m cantrādityavaṟ celuttakkaṭavarkaḷānamaikku Ikkoyilil śivabrāhmaṇan vṛṣabhavāhana bhaṭṭanum śrī kāriyam
viḷattūr kiḻavanum śrī māheśvarak kaṇkāṇi coti vaitta mānetiyum Ikkoyilil pāraśivan Aṅkāṭi koḷariyum
Ikkoyilil taccan tāmodharan tirumālp peṟuṭaiyānum Ippaṭi Aṟivom Ivvanaivom ..itu pa
nmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.274 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
